name: skill-sync
description: Sync Codex skills into Cursor, Codex, Trae, and other coding tool formats.

interface.shortDescription: Sync local skills across AI coding tools.
interface.longDescription: Skill Sync converts Codex skill directories into tool-specific instruction formats for Cursor, Codex, Trae, and configurable destinations.
defaultPrompt: Sync my skills to Cursor, Codex, and Trae.
